timelineWaveformDecodeFailedHint: Could not build a waveform (no decodable audio or decoder error).
timelineWaveformDisabledLargeFile: Waveform disabled for large files (memory guard).
timelineWaveformUnavailableLongTemplate: Long clip (> {max}s) — waveform is not built (memory guard).
timelineWaveformWebAudioUnavailable: Web Audio is not available in this context.
videoTimelineAudioStreamTitle: First audio track in the file (ffprobe data)
videoTimelineExportJumpTitle: Open the FFmpeg export panel: output and command preview (In/Out as -ss/-t)
videoTimelineFooterAria: Short video and audio summary from file analysis
videoTimelineInHandleDragTitle: Drag to move the In marker (export range start)
videoTimelineInHereTitle: Set the In marker (export range start) to the current playhead time
videoTimelineMarkerStripAria: Export range (In–Out): drag on the track to select
videoTimelineMarkerStripDragTitle: Drag on the track to select a range; a short click seeks to that time
videoTimelineMarkersOutsideWindowTitle: In/Out is outside the current window — zoom out.
videoTimelineOutHandleDragTitle: Drag to move the Out marker (export range end)
videoTimelineOutHereTitle: Set the Out marker (export range end) to the current playhead time
videoTimelinePaneGroupAria: Timeline track: visualization and position scrubber
videoTimelinePositionTitle: Current time; frame index estimated from stream frame rate in the track row
videoTimelineRulerAria: Playback window time ruler: click or arrow keys to seek
videoTimelineSaveFrameTitle: Save the current frame to a separate image file. Format (PNG/JPEG, etc.) is in the right panel under Audio & frame.
videoTimelineStackAria: Timeline: toolbar, track, and footer summary
videoTimelineStartExportTitle: Export with current FFmpeg settings (pick save location)
videoTimelineToolbarAria: Timeline: In, Out, jump to export, zoom
videoTimelineToolbarCenterTitle: Selected range duration and current playback position
videoTimelineTrimGroupAria: In, Out, reset trim, and time badges
videoTimelineTrimReadoutTitle: Export range (section 7.1): passed to ffmpeg as -ss / -t
videoTimelineUnifiedPaneAria: Unified time ruler and trim: click to seek, drag to select a range, drag the green/red trim lines for In/Out
videoTimelineUnifiedPaneHintTitle: Click to seek; drag to select a range; drag the green and red trim lines to move In/Out
videoTimelineUnifiedRegionAria: Timeline viewport: ruler, waveform, and range selection
videoTimelineVideoStreamTitle: First video track in the file (ffprobe data)
videoTimelineWaveformClusterAria: Waveform panel under the timeline ruler
videoTimelineZoomOutTitle: Zoom out (show a longer time range)
videoTimelineZoomReadoutTitle: Visible scrub range and marker strip
